subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy Name through which all names were transformed from their kingdoms and descended [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اقسمک باسمک الذی به انقلبت الاسما عن ملکوتها و نزلت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for purity; chastity
